metadata.description: HEIC/HEIF to JPEG conversion for Node.js consumers

commands: test -f ../../../apps/api/src/graphql/generated/schema.graphql || (echo "Schema file not found at apps/api/src/graphql/generated/schema.graphql. Run 'npm run schema-gen:api' first, or ensure contracts:codegen depends on api:schema-gen in project.json (it does, but nx may have silently skipped it)." && exit 1)

metadata.description: End-to-end Playwright tests for the photoapp web client. Runs against a locally-running stack.

metadata.scriptContent: npm run barrels --workspace=@packages/media-core && npm run barrels --workspace=@packages/contracts
npm run format && npm run gen:all && npm run build && npm run lint && npm run test
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml exec -T api npm run db:migrate:local --workspace=@app/api
docker compose -f docker-compose.yml exec -T api npm run db:seed:local --workspace=@app/api
npm run gen:ioc; npm run gen:gql; npm run gen:enums
npm run gen:graphql --workspace=@app/api; npm run codegen --workspace=@app/web
nx run api:gen:container && nx run media-worker:gen:container
npm run ioc:inspect --workspace=@app/api && npm run ioc:inspect --workspace=@app/media-worker
npm run ioc:inspect:discovery --workspace=@app/api && npm run ioc:inspect:discovery --workspace=@app/media-worker
rimraf node_modules api/node_modules web/node_modules contracts/node_modules api/dist web/dist contracts/dist dist .nx/cache && npm install && npm run build:clean && npm run lint && npm run test
rimraf api/dist web/dist contracts/dist dist .nx/cache && npm run build:clean && npm run lint && npm run test
